reason:
Agent attempted to use GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated username but failed due to OAuth token authentication errors (401 Bad credentials)
  Bugs found:
    - Agent received "401 Bad credentials" error when attempting to call GitHub API endpoints. The OAuth token associated with the GitHub connection appears to be invalid or expired. Even after granting fresh access through the Account Access Request card, the stored token continued to return 401 errors from the GitHub API. The agent was unable to retrieve the GitHub username as requested because the authentication credentials were rejected.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing "Your Agents" view with three agents listed
Step 2 - Clicked on "QA-20260507-201004-3y8c" agent in the sidebar - Agent details page opened successfully
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Status shown as "idle" ✓
Step 4 - Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message sent successfully, agent began processing
Step 5 - Account Access Request card appeared - Selected GitHub account (already checked) and clicked "Allow Access (1)" to grant access ✓
Step 6 - Waited for agent response - Agent worked for 3 minutes 6 seconds and provided a response

Step 7 - Verified response includes GitHub username - FAILED. Agent response stated: "The GitHub connection exists (account ID `f3025fff-cd12-4c59-a81f-44fc9b57b31b`), but the stored OAuth token is returning 401 Bad credentials from the GitHub API — even on a freshly granted access. I can't determine your username from this side." The agent attempted multiple API calls to GitHub /user endpoint and /octocat endpoint but all returned "Bad credentials" errors. No username was retrieved or provided in the response.
bugs: Agent received "401 Bad credentials" error when attempting to call GitHub API endpoints. The OAuth token associated with the GitHub connection appears to be invalid or expired. Even after granting fresh access through the Account Access Request card, the stored token continued to return 401 errors from the GitHub API. The agent was unable to retrieve the GitHub username as requested because the authentication credentials were rejected.
